name: Grand Marnier Cranberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Combine the orange juice, Grand Marnier, and oil in a large bowl.
3. In another bowl, whisk together the flours, sugar, baking powder, salt, and orange zest.
4. Beat the egg whites until frothy.
5. Pour the juice mixture into the beaten egg whites and stir to combine.
6. Add the egg mixture and cranberries to the flour mixture, stirring just until moist.
7. Divide the batter among 24 paper-lined muffin cups.
8. Bake for 25 minutes or until golden brown and puffed.
